---
name: Content Request
about: Suggest a new diagram, cheatsheet, or objective coverage
title: "[Request] "
labels: enhancement, content
---

## What would you like added?

A short title, e.g., "Add VPC peering vs Transit Gateway comparison diagram".

## Why is it useful?

Tie the request to a CV0-004 objective, an interview topic, or a real-world scenario.

## Proposed location

`diagrams/`, `cheatsheets/`, `objectives/domain-X/`, etc.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Mermaid diagram renders on GitHub
- [ ] Cross-links to existing objectives
- [ ] Matches existing style
